Package neqsim.process.chemistry.util

Class StreamChemistryAdapter

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.util.StreamChemistryAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class StreamChemistryAdapter extends Object implements Serializable
Adapter that extracts chemistry-relevant scalars from a NeqSim StreamInterface or SystemInterface.

The chemistry models in neqsim.process.chemistry historically took only scalar inputs (Ca mg/L, H2S ppm, etc.). This adapter is the single bridge used by every performance and compatibility model to pull those scalars from a real flowsheet stream so the manual transcription step is eliminated.

The adapter is robust: if a phase or component is missing the corresponding getter returns 0.0 (or Double.NaN for pH which is undefined without an aqueous phase). All concentrations are reported in conventional oilfield units (mg/L, ppm, bara, Celsius).

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    estimateWallShearStressPa(double pipeDiameterM, double velocityMs)
    Returns the wall shear stress estimate for a given pipe diameter and velocity, using a simple Darcy-Weisbach approximation (f = 0.02).
    double

    Returns the molality of a component in the aqueous phase as mg/L of cation/anion.

    Returns the H2S concentration in the gas phase in ppm (mole/mole).

    Returns the iron(II) concentration of the aqueous phase in mg/L.
    double
    getPartialPressureBara(String component)
    Returns the partial pressure of a gas-phase component in bara.
    double

    Returns the operating pressure in bara.
    double

    Returns the sodium concentration of the aqueous phase in mg/L.
    double

    Returns the sulphate concentration of the aqueous phase in mg/L.
    double
    getTdsMgL()
    Returns the total dissolved solids (TDS) of the aqueous phase as a rough sum of major ions.
    double
    getTemperatureCelsius()
    Returns the operating temperature in Celsius.

    Returns a snapshot map of all extracted chemistry scalars for diagnostics.

  • Constructor Details

    • StreamChemistryAdapter

      public StreamChemistryAdapter(StreamInterface stream)
      Build an adapter from a NeqSim stream.
      Parameters:
      stream - a flowsheet stream that has been run

    • StreamChemistryAdapter

      public StreamChemistryAdapter(SystemInterface system)
      Build an adapter from a thermo system directly.

  • Method Details

    • getTemperatureCelsius

      public double getTemperatureCelsius()
      Returns the operating temperature in Celsius.
      Returns:
      temperature in Celsius

    • getPressureBara

      public double getPressureBara()
      Returns the operating pressure in bara.
      Returns:
      pressure in bara

    • getPartialPressureBara

      public double getPartialPressureBara(String component)
      Returns the partial pressure of a gas-phase component in bara.
      Parameters:
      component - component name (e.g. "CO2", "H2S")
      Returns:
      partial pressure in bara, or 0 if no gas phase or component not present

    • getAqueousConcentrationMgL

      public double getAqueousConcentrationMgL(String component, double molarMassGmol)
      Returns the molality of a component in the aqueous phase as mg/L of cation/anion.

      Approximates concentration assuming aqueous-phase density of 1000 kg/m3. For most brine/produced-water concentrations this is within a few percent.

      Parameters:
      component - component name (e.g. "Ca++", "Na+", "Cl-", "HCO3-")
      molarMassGmol - molar mass of the species in g/mol
      Returns:
      concentration in mg/L (0 if no aqueous phase or component absent)

    • getCalciumMgL

      public double getCalciumMgL()
      Returns the calcium concentration of the aqueous phase in mg/L.
      Returns:
      Ca++ concentration in mg/L

    • getIronMgL

      public double getIronMgL()
      Returns the iron(II) concentration of the aqueous phase in mg/L.
      Returns:
      Fe++ concentration in mg/L

    • getBicarbonateMgL

      public double getBicarbonateMgL()
      Returns the bicarbonate concentration of the aqueous phase in mg/L.
      Returns:
      HCO3- concentration in mg/L

    • getChlorideMgL

      public double getChlorideMgL()
      Returns the chloride concentration of the aqueous phase in mg/L.
      Returns:
      Cl- concentration in mg/L

    • getSodiumMgL

      public double getSodiumMgL()
      Returns the sodium concentration of the aqueous phase in mg/L.
      Returns:
      Na+ concentration in mg/L

    • getSulphateMgL

      public double getSulphateMgL()
      Returns the sulphate concentration of the aqueous phase in mg/L.
      Returns:
      SO4-- concentration in mg/L

    • getBariumMgL

      public double getBariumMgL()
      Returns the barium concentration of the aqueous phase in mg/L.
      Returns:
      Ba++ concentration in mg/L

    • getH2SInGasPpm

      public double getH2SInGasPpm()
      Returns the H2S concentration in the gas phase in ppm (mole/mole).
      Returns:
      H2S in ppm or 0 if no gas phase

    • getGasFlowSm3PerDay

      public double getGasFlowSm3PerDay()
      Returns the gas flow rate in Sm3/d.
      Returns:
      gas flow in Sm3/d, 0 if no stream or no gas

    • getTdsMgL

      public double getTdsMgL()
      Returns the total dissolved solids (TDS) of the aqueous phase as a rough sum of major ions.
      Returns:
      TDS in mg/L

    • estimateWallShearStressPa

      public double estimateWallShearStressPa(double pipeDiameterM, double velocityMs)
      Returns the wall shear stress estimate for a given pipe diameter and velocity, using a simple Darcy-Weisbach approximation (f = 0.02). Returns 0 if no aqueous phase.
      Parameters:
      pipeDiameterM - pipe internal diameter in m
      velocityMs - flow velocity in m/s
      Returns:
      wall shear stress in Pa

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Returns a snapshot map of all extracted chemistry scalars for diagnostics.
      Returns:
      ordered map of extracted values
